mapper.sql: id, name, avatar, description, delivery_fee, min_order_amount, score, address, email, create_time, update_time, status, user_id
mapper.select: SELECT m.*, -- 商家基本信息 s.id AS spu_id, -- 菜品SPU ID（别名避免与商家ID冲突） s.name AS spu_name, s.category_id AS spu_category_id, s.merchant_id as spu_merchant_id, s.image AS spu_image, s.description AS spu_description, s.status AS spu_status, MiN(ku.price) AS spu_min_price FROM merchant m LEFT JOIN dish_spu s ON m.id = s.merchant_id -- 关联菜品SPU表 LEFT JOIN dish_sku ku ON ku.spu_id = s.id WHERE m.id = #{merchantId} -- 传入商家ID AND m.status = 0 -- 只查询正常营业的商家 AND s.status = 0 -- 只查询在售的SPU（可选，根据业务需求） GROUP BY m.id, -- 商家主键 s.id, -- SPU 主键 s.name, -- 以下所有非聚合列都要写 s.category_id, s.merchant_id, s.image, s.description, s.status

SELECT m.*, -- 商家基本信息 s.id AS spu_id, s.name AS spu_name, s.category_id AS spu_category_id, s.merchant_id as spu_merchant_id, s.image AS spu_image, s.description AS spu_description, s.status AS spu_status FROM merchant m LEFT JOIN dish_spu s ON m.id = s.merchant_id -- 关联菜品SPU表 WHERE m.status = 0 -- 只查询正常营业的商家 AND s.status = 0 -- 只查询在售的SPU（可选） ORDER BY m.create_time DESC -- 按创建时间倒序

SELECT m.*, -- 商家基本信息 s.id AS spu_id, s.name AS spu_name, s.category_id AS spu_category_id, s.merchant_id as spu_merchant_id, s.image AS spu_image, s.description AS spu_description, s.status AS spu_status FROM merchant m LEFT JOIN merchant_category mc on m.id=mc.merchant_id left join category c on c.id=mc.category_id LEFT JOIN dish_spu s ON m.id = s.merchant_id -- 关联菜品SPU表 WHERE m.status = 0 -- 只查询正常营业的商家 and mc.category_id=#{id} AND s.status = 0 -- 只查询在售的SPU（可选） ORDER BY m.create_time DESC -- 按创建时间倒序
